title: Dark Vendetta (short story)

"'''Dark Vendetta'''" is a short story written by [[Eric S. Trautmann]] and illustrated by [[Russell Walks]]. It was featured in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 8|''Star Wars Galaxy'' #8]], set in [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]].

==Plot summary==
After an intense Imperial interrogation on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the battered and beaten [[Corwin Shelvay/Legends|Corwin Shelvay]] and his [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Darrin Arkanian]] attempt to find [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rashh]] and get off the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. They're confronted by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]], who engages Arkanian in a [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber battle]]. Soon, a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] arrive and point their guns at Shelvay, and Tremayne tells Darrin to drop his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], or his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] would be [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Arkanian reluctantly turns off his lightsaber, allowing Tremayne to swing [[Antinnis Tremayne's lightsaber|his own lightsaber]] at the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], killing him. Suddenly, Shelvay grabs his master's lightsaber and, in one slash, cuts off Tremayne's arm and part of his face, which would later be replaced by [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic arm and cybernetic eye]], respectively.

When Tremayne woke up from his medical bed, he was met by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who showed clear disappointment in Tremayne's failure to obtain any information from the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Tremayne vowed he would not fail again.

==Continuity==
[[High Inquisitor|High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne|Tremayne]] was introduced in [[1993]] by [[West End Games]] as a potential villain for players of [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|Star Wars roleplaying games]]. Tremayne’s flashbacks in ''Dark Vendetta'' did not mesh easily with the continuity established years later with the release of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III]]. For example, the tale stated that he was recruited by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to aid [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] in the culling of corrupt [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] prior to Emperor cementing his rule.<ref name="TERC" />
